## Summary

- explain the workflow or product surface changed
- explain why this change is needed now

## Verification

- list the commands you actually ran
- include browser or runtime evidence when relevant

## Risks

- call out incomplete proof, follow-up work, or rollout caveats

## Checklist

- [ ] Docs are updated if product behavior or maturity claims changed
- [ ] Secrets and sensitive data are not exposed in the diff
- [ ] Changelog is updated when release-facing behavior changed
- [ ] Relevant tests or checks were run locally
